α : Type u_1
R : Type u_2
mα : MeasurableSpace α
mR : MeasurableSpace R
inst✝⁶ : Nonempty α
inst✝⁵ : StandardBorelSpace α
inst✝⁴ : DecidableEq α
inst✝³ : Countable α
inst✝² : StandardBorelSpace R
inst✝¹ : Nonempty R
alg : Algorithm α R
ν : Kernel α R
inst✝ : IsMarkovKernel ν
n : ℕ
⊢ IndepFun (fun ω => ω.1 (n + 1)) (fun x => @Bandits.ArrayModel.hist α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg x n)
    (@Bandits.ArrayModel.arrayMeasure α R mα mR ν)

  apply indepFun_prod_left (measurable_eval (n + 1)) (measurable_hist alg n)
  intro q
  suffices ∀ j > n, IndepFun (eval j) (fun p ↦ hist alg (p, q) n) (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume)
    from this (n + 1) n.lt_succ_self
  intro j hj
  induction n with
  | zero =>
    simp only [hist_zero]
    exact IndepFun.comp ((iIndepFun_infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume).indepFun hj.ne') (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  | succ n hn =>
    simp only [hist_add_one_eq_IicSuccProd, action_add_one_eq, reward_add_one]
    refine IndepFun.comp (IndepFun.prod_right (hn hj.gt_of_succ)
      ((iIndepFun_infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume).indepFun hj.ne')) (by fun_prop) ?_
    have : Measurable (fun x : (Iic n → α × R) × I ↦
      q (pullCount' n x.1 (algFunction alg n x.1 x.2)) (algFunction alg n x.1 x.2)) :=
      measurable_from_prod_countable_left (fun _ ↦ by fun_prop)
    fun_prop

let X := fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ (ω.1 (n + 1), ())
  let Y := fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ (fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i.1, ω.2)
  have h_indep : IndepFun X Y (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    refine indepFun_prod_prod ?_ (indepFun_const (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) ())
    exact (iIndepFun_infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume).indepFun_project (S := Iic n) (j := n + 1) (by simp)
  let g : (Iic n → I) × (ℕ → α → R) → (Iic n → α × R) :=
    fun x ↦ hist alg (fun i ↦ if hi : i ≤ n then x.1 ⟨i, hi⟩ else x.1 ⟨0, by simp⟩, x.2) n
  have hg : Measurable g := by
    refine (measurable_hist alg n).comp (Measurable.prodMk ?_ measurable_snd)
    exact measurable_pi_iff.mpr (fun i ↦ by split_ifs <;> fun_prop)
  have h_eq : (fun ω ↦ hist alg ω n) = g ∘ Y := by
    ext ω
    dsimp [g, Y]
    congr
    ext i
    split_ifs with hi
    · rfl
    · have : i ≤ n := i.2
      contradiction
  rw [h_eq]
  exact h_indep.comp measurable_fst hg

end ArrayModel

let f : Option ℕ → probSpace α R → (I ⊕ (ℕ → α → R)) := fun i ω ↦ match i with
    | some i => Sum.inl (ω.1 i) | none => Sum.inr ω.2
  have h_indep : iIndepFun f (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    rw [arrayMeasure, iIndepFun_iff]
    intro S hS h_meas
    rw [Measure.prod_apply (MeasurableSet.univ.inter_preimage (measurable_set_pi.mpr hS))]
    simp only [Measure.infinitePi_apply, Set.univ_inter, Set.preimage_preimage,
      Bandit.streamMeasure, Measure.infinitePi_prod_infinitePi]
    let S1 := {i : ℕ | some i ∈ S}
    have hS1 : S1.Finite := hS.preimage (show Function.Injective some by grind)
    rw [← Finset.prod_subset (hS1.toFinset.subset_univ)]
    · simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Finset.mem_univ, ↓reduceIte, Finset.mem_coe,
        Finset.mem_toFinset, and_true]
      let S2 := {() | none ∈ S}
      by_cases hnone : none ∈ S <;> simp [hnone, Bandit.streamMeasure, S2]
    · intro i _ hi; simp [Finset.mem_toFinset, S1] at hi; grind
  let S1 : Finset (Option ℕ) := {some (n + 1)}
  let S2 : Finset (Option ℕ) := (Finset.range (n + 1)).map ⟨some, by grind⟩ ∪ {none}
  have h_disj : Disjoint S1 S2 := by grind
  have h_f1 : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ f (some (n + 1)) ω) (fun ω ↦ fun i : S2 ↦ f i ω) (arrayMeasure ν) :=
    (h_indep.indepFun_finset h_disj (by grind) (by grind))
  refine h_f1.comp (g := fun h ↦ hist alg (fun i ↦ match i.1 with | some i => (h i).getLeft | none => (h i).getRight (by grind)) n)
    (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) ?_
  ext ω
  induction n with
  | zero => simp [hist_zero, action_zero, S2, f]
  | succ n ih =>
    rw [hist_add_one, ih]
    congr; ext i; by_cases hi : i ≤ n <;> simp [hi, f, S2]

refine indepFun_prod_left (by fun_prop) (measurable_hist alg n).aemeasurable ?_
  intro y
  induction n with
  | zero =>

    exact (iIndepFun_infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume).indepFun (by grind)
  | succ n _ =>
    simp only [hist_add_one_eq_IicSuccProd, reward_add_one, action_add_one_eq]
    refine IndepFun.comp (hfg := (iIndepFun_infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume).indepFun_pi (by grind)) (by fun_prop) ?_
    fun_prop

end ArrayModel

refine indepFun_fst_prod (by fun_prop) (measurable_hist _ _) (Filter.eventually_of_forall fun ω2 ↦ ?_)
  let f : (ℕ → I) → (Iic n → I) := fun η i ↦ η i
  let ψ : (Iic n → I) → (Iic n → α × R) := fun v1 ↦ hist alg (fun i ↦ if hi : i ≤ n then v1 ⟨i, hi⟩ else 0, ω2) n
  have h_eq : (fun η ↦ hist alg (η, ω2) n) = ψ ∘ f := by
    ext η; induction n with
    | zero => ext i; simp [hist_zero]
    | succ n ih =>
      ext i; rw [hist_eq, hist_eq]
      congr; ext j; simp only [f, coe_mem, ↓reduceDIte]
  rw [h_eq]
  refine IndepFun.comp ?_ (by fun_prop) (by sorry)
  exact (iIndepFun_infinitePi _).indepFun_pi_pi (S := {n + 1}) (T := Set.univ) (by grind)

let f : probSpace α R → I := fun ω ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)
  let g : probSpace α R → (ℕ → I) × (ℕ → α → R) := fun ω ↦ (fun i ↦ if i ≤ n then ω.1 i else 0, ω.2)
  have h_indep : IndepFun f g (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    refine indepFun_iff_measure_inter_preimage_eq.mpr fun s t hs ht ↦ ?_
    simp only [f, g, arrayMeasure, Measure.prod_apply, Set.mem_preimage]
    have h_hist_mem : ∀ x, (fun i ↦ if i ≤ n then x i else 0) = (fun i ↦ if i ≤ n then some (x i) else none) ∘ (fun i ↦ i) := by sorry
    sorry
  have h_hist_eq : ∀ ω, hist alg ω n = hist alg (g ω) n := by
    intro ω
    induction n with
    | zero => simp [hist_zero, g, action_zero]
    | succ n ih => sorry
  exact h_indep.comp measurable_id (measurable_hist alg n |>.comp (by fun_prop))

have h (n m : ℕ) (h_lt : n < m) :
      IndepFun (fun ω ↦ ω.1 m) (hist alg · n) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    induction n generalizing m with
    | zero =>
      rw [hist_zero]
      refine IndepFun.comp ?_ ?_ (measurable_hist _ 0)
      refine indepFun_prod_right ?_ ?_ (indepFun_fst_snd _)
      exact (iIndepFun_infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume).indepFun h_lt.ne'
    | succ n ih =>
      rw [hist_add_one_eq_IicSuccProd]
      refine IndepFun.comp ?_ ?_ (measurable_hist _ (n + 1))
      refine indepFun_prod_right (ih m h_lt) ?_ ?_
      · refine IndepFun.comp ?_ ?_ (Measurable.prodMk (measurable_action _ (n + 1)) (measurable_reward _ (n + 1)))
        refine indepFun_prod_right ?_ ?_ (indepFun_fst_snd _)
        exact (iIndepFun_infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume).indepFun h_lt.ne'
      · exact Measurable.aemeasurable (measurable_hist _ _)
  exact h n (n + 1) (Nat.lt_succ_self n)

end ArrayModel

have hi : IndepFun (fun ξ ↦ ξ (n + 1)) (fun ξ ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ ξ i) (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume) :=
    (iIndepFun_infinitePi _).indepFun_eval_pi (by grind)
  have h_indep : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ (fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i, ω.2)) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    rw [arrayMeasure, indepFun_iff_map_prod_eq, Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop),
      show (fun ω ↦ (ω.1 (n + 1), (fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i, ω.2))) =
      Prod.map (fun ξ ↦ (ξ (n + 1), fun i : Iic n ↦ ξ i)) id by ext; rfl,
      Measure.map_prod_map (by fun_prop) measurable_id, hi.map_eq, Measure.map_id,
      Measure.prod_assoc, ← Measure.map_prod_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop), ← indepFun_iff_map_prod_eq]
    exact indepFun_fst_snd _
  let H : (Iic n → I) × (ℕ → α → R) → (Iic n → α × R) := fun p ↦
    hist alg (fun i ↦ if h : i ≤ n then p.1 ⟨i, h⟩ else (0 : I), p.2) n
  have hH : Measurable H := by
    refine (measurable_hist alg n).comp (Measurable.prodMk ?_ (by fun_prop))
    exact measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun i ↦ measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun j ↦ by fun_prop
  have heq : hist alg · n = H ∘ (fun ω ↦ (fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i, ω.2)) := by
    ext ω; simp [H]; congr; ext i; split_ifs with h
    · rfl
    · rw [hist_eq, hist_eq]
      congr; ext j hj; simp only [hj.trans_le (not_le.mp h).le, ↓reduceDIte]
  rw [heq]
  exact h_indep.comp (by fun_prop) hH

end ArrayModel

refine IndepFun.mono_right (IndepFun.indepFun_prod_mk_right ?_ ?_) (measurable_hist alg n)
  · exact (iIndepFun_infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume).indepFun (by grind) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)

let f : probSpace α R → I := fun ω ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)
  let g : probSpace α R → (Iic n → I) × (ℕ → α → R) := fun ω ↦ (fun i ↦ ω.1 i.1, ω.2)
  have h_indep : IndepFun f g (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    rw [arrayMeasure, IndepFun, Measure.map_prod (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
    ext s t hs ht
    rw [Measure.prod_apply (hs.preimage (by fun_prop)).inter (ht.preimage (by fun_prop))]
    have h1 : ∀ ω₂, (fun ω₁ ↦ (f (ω₁, ω₂), g (ω₁, ω₂))) ⁻¹' (s ×ˢ t) =
        (fun ω₁ ↦ ω₁ (n + 1)) ⁻¹' s ×ˢ (fun ω₁ ↦ (fun i : Iic n ↦ ω₁ i.1, ω₂.2)) ⁻¹' t := by
      intro; ext; simp [f, g, Set.prod_mk_mem_set_prod_eq]
    simp_rw [h1]
    have h_pi_indep : IndepFun (fun ω₁ ↦ ω₁ (n + 1)) (fun ω₁ ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ ω₁ i.1)
        (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume) :=
      indepFun_pi_singleton_set (fun i h ↦ (Nat.lt_succ_iff.1 i.2).ne h)
    simp_rw [Measure.infinitePi_prod_volume, Measure.prod_apply]
    calc ∫ ω₂, (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume) ((fun ω₁ ↦ ω₁ (n + 1)) ⁻¹' s ∩
        (fun ω₁ ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ ω₁ i.1) ⁻¹' ((fun h ↦ (h, ω₂)) ⁻¹' t)) ∂(Bandit.streamMeasure ν)
    _ = ∫ ω₂, (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume) ((fun ω₁ ↦ ω₁ (n + 1)) ⁻¹' s) *
        (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume) ((fun ω₁ ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ ω₁ i.1) ⁻¹'
        ((fun h ↦ (h, ω₂)) ⁻¹' t)) ∂(Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
      refine integral_congr_ae (ae_of_all _ fun ω₂ ↦ h_pi_indep.measure_inter_preimage_eq hs ?_)
      exact MeasurableSet.preimage (by fun_prop) ht
    _ = (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume) ((fun ω₁ ↦ ω₁ (n + 1)) ⁻¹' s) *
        (arrayMeasure ν) (g ⁻¹' t) := by
      simp [g, arrayMeasure, Measure.prod_apply, hs, ht, mul_assoc, integral_mul_left]
    _ = (arrayMeasure ν) (f ⁻¹' s) * (arrayMeasure ν) (g ⁻¹' t) := by
      rw [arrayMeasure, Measure.prod_apply_symm (hs.preimage (by fun_prop))]
      simp [f, integral_universal, hs]
  exact h_indep.comp (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)

let S1 : MeasurableSpace (probSpace α R) := (measurable_eval (n + 1)).comp measurable_fst
  let S2 : MeasurableSpace (probSpace α R) :=

have h_indep_fst : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    apply IndepFun.comp (f := fst)

    · simp only [Set.disjoint_singleton_left, Set.mem_range, not_exists]
      intro i; exact (Nat.ne_of_gt i.2).symm
    · exact measurable_pi_lambda _ fun _ ↦ measurable_id
    · exact measurable_pi_lambda _ fun _ ↦ measurable_pi_lambda _ fun _ ↦ measurable_id
  have h_indep_fst_snd : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ (ω.1 (n + 1), fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i)) (fun ω ↦ ω.2) (arrayMeasure ν) :=
    (indepFun_fst_snd ν).comp (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  have h_indep_all : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ (fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i, ω.2)) (arrayMeasure ν) :=
    h_indep_fst.indepFun_prod_mk_right h_indep_fst_snd

    exact h_indep_all.comp (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  | succ n _ =>

        (by grind))) ?_

      refine Measurable.comp (by fun_prop) (Measurable.prodMk ?_ ?_)
      · exact measurable_from_prod_countable_left (fun _ ↦ by fun_prop)
      · refine Measurable.prodMk (by fun_prop) ?_
        exact measurable_from_prod_countable_left (fun _ ↦ by fun_prop)
  exact h (n + 1) n (Nat.lt_succ_self n)

end ArrayModel

have h : ∀ m > n, IndepFun (fun ω ↦ ω.1 m) (hist alg · n) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      intro m hm
      rw [hist_zero]
      refine IndepFun.comp (f := fun ω ↦ ω.1 m) (g := fun ω ↦ (ω.1 0, ω.2)) ?_ (by fun_prop) ?_
      · refine IndepFun.prod_right ?_ ?_

        · exact (indepFun_fst_snd ν).comp (measurable_eval m) measurable_id
      · refine measurable_pi_iff.mpr (fun _ ↦ ?_)
        refine Measurable.prodMk (by fun_prop) ?_
        have h1 : Measurable (fun (x : (ℕ → α → R) × ℕ × α) ↦ x.1 x.2.1 x.2.2) :=
          measurable_from_prod_countable_left fun _ ↦ (by simp only; fun_prop)
        exact h1.comp (by fun_prop)
    | succ n ih =>
      intro m hm
      rw [hist_add_one_eq_IicSuccProd]
      refine IndepFun.comp (f := fun ω ↦ ω.1 m) (g := fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, ω.1 (n + 1), ω.2)) ?_ (by fun_prop) ?_
      · refine IndepFun.prod_right (ih m (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt hm)) ?_
        refine IndepFun.prod_right ?_ ?_
        · exact (iIndepFun_infinitePi (fun _ ↦ volume)).indepFun hm.ne'
        · exact (indepFun_fst_snd ν).comp (measurable_eval m) measurable_id
      · refine (MeasurableEquiv.IicSuccProd (fun _ ↦ α × R) n).symm.measurable.comp ?_
        refine Measurable.prodMk (by fun_prop) ?_
        refine Measurable.prodMk (by fun_prop) ?_
        have h1 : Measurable (fun (x : (ℕ → α → R) × ℕ × α) ↦ x.1 x.2.1 x.2.2) :=
          measurable_from_prod_countable_left fun _ ↦ (by simp only; fun_prop)
        exact h1.comp (by fun_prop)
  exact h (n + 1) n.lt_succ_self

end ArrayModel

end Bandits

have h_indep : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ (fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i, ω.2)) (arrayMeasure ν) := by
    apply IndepFun.prod_right
    · exact (indepFun_proj_infinitePi (fun _ ↦ volume) {n + 1} (Iic n)
        (disjoint_singleton_left.mpr (Nat.not_succ_le_self n))).comp (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
    · exact (indepFun_fst_snd ν).comp (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
    · exact (indepFun_fst_snd ν).comp (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  exact h_indep.comp measurable_id (measurable_hist alg n)

end ArrayModel

induction n with
  | zero => simp [hist_zero]; exact (indepFun_fst_snd ν).comp (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  | succ n _ => rw [hist_add_one_eq_IicSuccProd]; sorry

refine indepFun_prod_left (by fun_prop) (measurable_hist alg n) fun ω2 ↦ ?_
  let ψ := fun η ↦ hist alg (fun i ↦ if h : i ≤ n then η ⟨i, h⟩ else (default : I), ω2) n
  have : (fun f ↦ hist alg (f, ω2) n) = ψ ∘ (fun f (i : Iic n) ↦ f i.1) := by
    ext; simp [ψ]; congr; ext; simp [*]
  rw [this]
  exact (iIndepFun_infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume).indepFun (i := n + 1) (s := Iic n) (by simp)
    |>.comp measurable_id (by fun_prop)

have h1 : iIndepFun (fun i ω ↦ ω.1 i) (arrayMeasure ν) := (iIndepFun_infinitePi _).comp (by fun_prop)
  have h2 : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i.1) (arrayMeasure ν) :=
    h1.indepFun (by grind) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  have h3 : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ (ω.1 (n + 1), fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i.1)) (fun ω ↦ ω.2) (arrayMeasure ν) :=
    indepFun_fst_snd.comp (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  exact (h3.indepFun_prod_right h2).comp (by fun_prop) (measurable_hist alg n)

end ArrayModel

end Bandits

rw [arrayMeasure, indepFun_prod_iff (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
  refine ae_of_all _ (fun ω2 ↦ ?_)
  refine indepFun_proj_infinitePi (s := {n + 1}) (t := Set.Iic n) (by grind) |>.measurable_space_le ?_ ?_
  · exact Measurable.comap_mono (measurable_pi_iff.1 (by fun_prop) ⟨n + 1, rfl⟩)
  · exact Measurable.comap_mono (by fun_prop)

end ArrayModel

end Bandits

refine (IndepFun.indepFun_prod_mk ((iIndepFun_infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume).indepFun_set_set
    (s := {n + 1}) (t := Iic n) (by simp) |>.comp (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) |>.comp (X := Prod.fst)
    (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)) ((indepFun_fst_snd ν).comp (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop))).comp
    (f := id) (g := fun p ↦ hist alg (fun i ↦ if hi : i ≤ n then p.1 ⟨i, hi⟩ else default, p.2) n)
    (by fun_prop) ((measurable_hist _ _).comp (by fun_prop)) ?_
  ext ω
  induction n with
  | zero => simp; congr; funext i; simp; rw [Unique.eq_default i]; rfl
  | succ n ih => simp [hist_add_one, ih]; congr; funext i; simp

induction n with
  | zero =>
    simp only [hist_zero]
    refine IndepFun.comp (f := fun ω ↦ ω.1 1) (g := fun ω ↦ (ω.1 0, ω.2 0)) (measurable_pi_apply 1) ?_ (by fun_prop)
    rw [arrayMeasure, IndepFun, Measure.map_prodMk_prod, Measure.prod_assoc, ← Measure.map_prodMk_prod]
    · have h_indep : IndepFun (fun η : ℕ → I ↦ η 1) (fun η ↦ η 0) (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume) :=
        indepFun_pi_pi (S := {1}) (T := {0}) (by simp [Disjoint]) (measurable_pi_apply 1) (measurable_pi_apply 0)
      rw [h_indep.map_eq]; simp
    · exact measurable_pi_apply 1
    · exact measurable_pi_apply 0
    · exact measurable_snd
  | succ n ih =>
    simp only [hist_add_one_eq_IicSuccProd, action_add_one_eq, reward_add_one]
    refine IndepFun.comp (f := fun ω ↦ ω.1 (n + 2)) (g := fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, ω.1 (n + 1), ω.2))
      (measurable_pi_apply (n + 2)) ?_ (by fun_prop)
    rw [arrayMeasure, IndepFun, Measure.map_prodMk_prod, Measure.prod_assoc, ← Measure.map_prodMk_prod]
    · have h_indep : IndepFun (fun η : ℕ → I ↦ η (n + 2)) (fun η ↦ (η ∘ ((↑) : Iic n → ℕ), η (n + 1))) (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume) := by
        refine IndepFun.comp (f := fun η ↦ η (n + 2)) (g := fun η ↦ η ∘ ((↑) : Iic (n + 1) → ℕ)) (measurable_pi_apply (n + 2)) ?_ (by fun_prop)
        exact indepFun_pi_pi (S := {n + 2}) (T := Set.range ((↑) : Iic (n + 1) → ℕ)) (by simp [Disjoint, Iic]; intro; omega) (measurable_pi_apply (n + 2)) (measurable_pi_lambda _ (fun i ↦ measurable_pi_apply _))
      rw [h_indep.map_eq]; simp
    · exact measurable_pi_apply (n + 2)
    · exact measurable_prod (measurable_pi_lambda _ (fun i ↦ measurable_pi_apply _)) (measurable_pi_apply (n + 1))
    · exact measurable_snd

induction n with
  | zero =>
    simp [hist_zero]
    refine IndepFun.comp (f := id) (g := id) ?_ (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
    refine IndepFun.prod_right ?_ ((indepFun_fst_snd ν).comp (by fun_prop) measurable_id)
    exact (iIndepFun_infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume).indepFun (by simp) |>.fst_prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν)
  | succ n ih =>
    simp [hist_add_one]
    refine IndepFun.comp (f := id) (g := id) ?_ (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
    refine IndepFun.prod_right ?_ ((indepFun_fst_snd ν).comp (by fun_prop) measurable_id)
    refine IndepFun.prod_right ?_ ?_
    · exact (iIndepFun_infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume).indepFun_set_set (s := {n + 2}) (t := Iic n)
        (by simp; intro i; simp; intro hi; omega) |>.fst_prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν)
    · exact (iIndepFun_infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume).indepFun (by simp) |>.fst_prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν)

have h1 : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ ω.1 (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i.1) (arrayMeasure ν) :=
    (iIndepFun_infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume).indepFun_pi_indices (s := {n + 1}) (t := Set.Iic n)
      (by simp [disjoint_singleton_left]) |> IndepFun.fst |>.comp (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  have h2 : IndepFun (fun ω ↦ (ω.1 (n + 1), fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i.1)) (fun ω ↦ ω.2) (arrayMeasure ν) :=
    (indepFun_fst_snd (ν := ν)).comp (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  refine IndepFun.mono (h2.indepFun_prod_right h1) (le_refl _) ?_
  refine (measurable_hist alg n).le_measurable_space_iff.mpr fun t ht ↦ ?_
  have : (fun ω ↦ hist alg ω n) = (fun p : _ × _ ↦ hist alg (fun i ↦ if h : i ≤ n then p.1 ⟨i, h⟩ else ω.1 i, p.2) n) ∘ (fun ω ↦ (fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i.1, ω.2)) := by
    ext ω; simp [hist_eq]
  rw [this]
  exact MeasurableSet.preimage ht (by fun_prop)

rw [arrayMeasure]
  refine IndepFun.mono_right (g := fun ω ↦ ((fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 i.1), ω.2)) ?_ (measurable_hist alg n).le_comap
  refine IndepFun.indepFun_prod_mk_snd ?_ ?_ measurable_id
  · exact (iIndepFun_infinitePi fun _ ↦ volume).indepFun_proj (n + 1) (Iic n) (by simp)
  · exact measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun i ↦ measurable_eval i.1
